text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-2nd:ShingekiNoKyojin is the 11th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"Shingeki no Kyojin" is the Japanese name of Attack on Titan and the Attack Titan.

Musical motifs

The track has 2 remixes:

[[ThanksAT|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-6th:ThanksAT]]
T-KT

Additionally, the soaring melody at 1:41-2:11 is used as a motif in LENぞ97n10火巨説MAHLE (1:07-1:30).

All occurrences

Episode 54 - Bertholdt and Reiner are defeated
Episode 57 - Gross talks to Grisha as he turns his final comrade into a Titan until he is killed by Kruger
